title: Archetype — inside any backend-* Thrift service
subtitle: box = component · arrow = uses / calls · the generic skeleton shared by the 9 Thrift backends (backend-organization, backend-workspace …)

cards: +Thrift RPC Dispatcher|main.go · go-common|routes each RPC to a domain handler
+Domain Handlers · per entity|client/<entity>.go|one per domain object

rels: Dispatcher → domain handlers (client/*.go) → Service Logic → Models / Repository
Writes pass through Field Encryption → MongoDB
Cache / session → KeyDB; domain events → Event-Bus Producer → Kafka
api-* never read these collections directly — only via this Thrift interface
refs: concrete examples: backend-auth (L3, §A6) · backend-organization · backend-workspace … — pattern shared by 9 backends
caption: Identity Platform · Component view · backend-* archetype (C4 L3) — generic skeleton from client/* + internal/ + model/
